---
title: "New Data Quick Check"
author: "PhillyStat360"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

data_path <- "../rawdata/"
```

# 1. Real Estate Transfers

```{r rtt-load}
rtt <- read_csv(paste0(data_path, "RTT_SUMMARY.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

cat("Rows:", comma(nrow(rtt)), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(rtt), "\n")
```

```{r rtt-names}
cat("All columns:\n")
cat(paste(names(rtt), collapse = "\n"))
```

```{r rtt-head}
glimpse(rtt)
```

```{r rtt-joinkey}
# 确认 join key 存在且能对上 opa_properties_public
properties <- read_csv(paste0(data_path, "opa_properties_public.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

# 找可能的 join key
possible_keys <- names(rtt)[str_detect(tolower(names(rtt)), "opa|parcel|account")]
cat("Possible join keys:", paste(possible_keys, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

if (length(possible_keys) > 0) {
  for (k in possible_keys) {
    match_rate <- mean(rtt[[k]] %in% properties$parcel_number, na.rm = TRUE)
    cat(k, "→ match rate with properties:", percent(match_rate, accuracy = 0.1), "\n")
  }
}
```

```{r rtt-dates}
# 找日期列
date_cols <- names(rtt)[str_detect(tolower(names(rtt)), "date")]
cat("Date columns:", paste(date_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

if ("display_date" %in% names(rtt)) {
  cat("Date range:", as.character(min(rtt$display_date, na.rm = TRUE)), 
      "to", as.character(max(rtt$display_date, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
}
```

```{r rtt-doctype}
# 文档类型分布 (deed, mortgage, sheriff sale 等)
if ("document_type" %in% names(rtt)) {
  rtt %>%
    count(document_type, sort = TRUE) %>%
    head(15) %>%
    kable(caption = "Top 15 document types") %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
}
```

---

# 2. Building & Zoning Permits

```{r permits-load}
permits <- read_csv(paste0(data_path, "permits_2020.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

cat("Rows:", comma(nrow(permits)), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(permits), "\n")
```

```{r permits-names}
cat("All columns:\n")
cat(paste(names(permits), collapse = "\n"))
```

```{r permits-head}
glimpse(permits)
```

```{r permits-joinkey}
# 找 join key
possible_keys_p <- names(permits)[str_detect(tolower(names(permits)), "opa|parcel|account")]
cat("Possible join keys:", paste(possible_keys_p, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

if (length(possible_keys_p) > 0) {
  for (k in possible_keys_p) {
    match_rate <- mean(permits[[k]] %in% properties$parcel_number, na.rm = TRUE)
    cat(k, "→ match rate with properties:", percent(match_rate, accuracy = 0.1), "\n")
  }
}
```

```{r permits-dates}
date_cols_p <- names(permits)[str_detect(tolower(names(permits)), "date")]
cat("Date columns:", paste(date_cols_p, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

if ("permitissuedate" %in% names(permits)) {
  cat("Date range:", as.character(min(permits$permitissuedate, na.rm = TRUE)),
      "to", as.character(max(permits$permitissuedate, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
}
```

```{r permits-type}
# Permit type 分布 — VacancyGuide 用 demolition, new construction, plumbing 等
if ("permittype" %in% names(permits)) {
  permits %>%
    count(permittype, sort = TRUE) %>%
    kable(caption = "Permit types") %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
}
```

```{r permits-status}
# Status 分布
if ("status" %in% names(permits)) {
  permits %>%
    count(status, sort = TRUE) %>%
    kable(caption = "Permit status") %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
}
```

```{r permits-typeofwork}
# Type of work — VacancyGuide 用 'new construction', 'addition and/or alteration'
if ("typeofwork" %in% names(permits)) {
  permits %>%
    count(typeofwork, sort = TRUE) %>%
    head(15) %>%
    kable(caption = "Top 15 types of work") %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
}
```

---

# 3. Summary

```{r summary}
cat("=== Data Inventory Update ===\n\n")
cat("Real Estate Transfers:", comma(nrow(rtt)), "records\n")
cat("Permits (2020+):", comma(nrow(permits)), "records\n\n")
cat("Both datasets loaded successfully.\n")
cat("Next: integrate into 05_feature_engineering.Rmd\n")
```
